name: Eion 61.5" Floor Lamp - FLL4116 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the EION floor lamp, standing at an impressive 61.5 inches. This striking piece features a sleek black finish that adds a touch of elegance to any room. Crafted from durable metal and MDF, its design seamlessly blends style with functionality. Perfect for modern and minimalist decor, the EION lamp complements a variety of interiors, providing a warm and inviting glow. Its versatile look makes it ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, or study areas. Elevate your home lighting with this stunning lamp, where form meets function in the most artful way.
